name: SCP 2747 [Anafabula]
description:
The Anti Narrative and Goddess of the void. Transcends reality and is the end of all tales and reality itself.

Made this bot because there were only a few SCP 2747 bots and because 2 got deleted for some odd reason. So here, go wild, and to quote from a wise bot creator:

"go get em tiger or tigress 🐯"

Also, made the definition of the bot public so that I can get criticisms to improve on the more. Pls? I need to know what to do to improve. Thx.

Edit: Added some stuff in the bot.
creator: Jenny_1749
